parts.text: How much does overnight shipping cost?

Hello! Thank you for reaching out to us. 

Our Overnight Shipping option costs $29.99 and takes next business day to arrive. 

If you have any other questions or need help placing your shipment, please let me know!

Hello! Thank you for reaching out to us. 

Our Overnight Shipping option costs $29.99 and takes next business day to arrive. 

If you have any other questions or need help placing your shipment, please let me know!
Where is my package? The tracking number is 1234567890.

Hello! Thank you for reaching out to us. 

You can check the real-time status of your package by entering your 10-digit tracking number (**1234567890**) on the tracking page of our website. 

If the tracking status shows that your package has been "delivered" but you cannot find it, we recommend verifying with your neighbors to see if it was accepted on your behalf. If you still cannot locate it, please contact our tracking team directly at **tracking@shippingco.com** so we can assist you further.

If you have any other questions, please feel free to ask!

If you still cannot locate it, please contact our tracking team directly at **tracking@shippingco.com** so we can assist you further.

If you have any other questions, please feel free to ask!
Can I return an item I received 15 days ago?

Yes, you can absolutely return your item! 

According to our policy, returns are free as long as they are initiated within 30 days of delivery (so your item received 15 days ago is well within this window). 

To qualify for a free return, please ensure that the item is unused and in its original packaging. You can easily initiate the return and print your pre-paid return shipping label through our online customer portal. 

Please let me know if you need help navigating the portal or if you have any other questions!
